final:
module RefModule(
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg [3:0] OUT
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (RST) begin
        OUT <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        OUT <= OUT + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
